data.content: Implementation review requested changes on 2026-03-14: src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-step-failure-rollback.test.ts:273 is labeled as a max-iterations rollback test, but the body explicitly exercises the initial non-zero child exit path instead. The actual max-iterations branch in src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:1225-1231 remains untested, so the required rollback coverage is incomplete.
